calendar.matters:
Petition To Discharge Executor And Surety Without Administration, Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Darin Donavan for Annette Severiens (Petitioner).

Mr. Donavan stated that he received a call from the assurity company stating that they needed a discharge. In addition, he stated that he thought the Hegstad order would have mooted the probate matters. The Court approved the termination of the estate and the bond, but denied the request for Nunc Pro Tunc. The Court directed Mr. Donavan to redraft the order.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2004 Granted Per Written Order
